rationale: Poisson-noise desaturation of the t0030 diameter sweep on t0022 is deprioritised for the same reasons as S-0029-01: t0044 (Schachter re-test on the t0043 output substrate) will re-examine the diameter axis after the channel inventory is fixed, and t0039 already established that the diameter axis on t0022 at GABA=4 nS shows passive filtering (slope -0.034 p=0.008). The Poisson-noise rerun remains a valid secondary experiment but does not belong in the next wave.
